items.title: Kidnapped Nigerian retired general dies in captivity
items.dek: Maj Gen Rabe Abubakar's death highlights continuing security challenges facing parts of the country.
items.body: Maj Gen Rabe Abubakar's death highlights continuing security challenges facing parts of the country.

items.title: Woman seriously injured in shark attack at Sydney beach
items.dek: The woman, 35, was pulled from the water by members of the public and then airlifted to hospital, police say.
